entries.openingLines: We were somewhere around Barstow on the edge of the desert when the drugs began to take hold.
entries.title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas

entries.openingLines: You are about to begin reading Italo Calvino's new novel, If on a winter's night a traveler.

entries.openingLines: Last night I dreamt I went to Manderley again.
entries.title: Rebecca
entries.author: Daphne du Maurier
